name: Lookup System Locale
notes:
This rule detects looking up system locale.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: _pete_0, TheDFIRReport
SIGMA Title: Console CodePage Lookup Via CHCP
SIGMA Description: Detects use of chcp to look up the system locale value as part of host discovery


Confidence: HIGH

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Success, System.File Created

when the event matches LOWER("Parent Process Full Full Name") == 'cmd.exe' AND ( LOWER("Parent Command") LIKE '% /c %' OR LOWER("Parent Command") LIKE '% /r %' OR LOWER("Parent Command") LIKE '% /k %' ) AND LOWER("Process Full Full Name") == 'chcp.com' AND LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?(chcp)_s*?' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Lookup System Locale on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Success, System.File Created

AND when the event matches LOWER("Parent Process Full Full Name") == 'cmd.exe' AND  (     LOWER("Parent Command") LIKE '% /c %'     OR LOWER("Parent Command") LIKE '% /r %'     OR LOWER("Parent Command") LIKE '% /k %' ) AND LOWER("Process Full Full Name") == 'chcp.com' AND LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?(chcp)_s*?' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event description: Detects looking up system locale.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
